title: Atlas Pilot Delivery Standup

decisions.decision: Keep pilot scope limited to SSO, billing connector validation, and read-only dashboard views.
Use Northstar Bank as the primary SSO validation account once metadata arrives.

action_items: Sam to follow up with Northstar Bank IT on SAML metadata.
Priya to send the dashboard preview link to Sales by Wednesday afternoon.

title: Atlas Pilot Go-To-Market Sync

decisions.decision: Customer Success will run the pilot with Northstar Bank, Vale Health, and Ridgeway Logistics.
Launch readiness review stays scheduled for Friday at 15:00 with Engineering, Sales, and Support.

action_items: Mina to publish kickoff notes and pilot success criteria.
Noah to confirm whether Finance can provide Stripe sandbox access before the readiness review.

title: Launch Readiness Review

decisions.decision: Proceed with Monday pilot kickoff if SSO metadata and Stripe sandbox access are both resolved.

action_items: Ari to update the API changelog before pilot kickoff.
Support to open a dedicated #atlas-pilot-support channel.
